rationale: Response correctly explains PIPA vs APPI consent paradigms and recommends parallel addenda with accurate regulatory citations (Art. 17 PIPA, Art. 24 APPI). However, the answer treats this as a generic privacy-law comparison rather than integrating Hanseo's cross-border logistics context, operating jurisdictions (KR/JP/DE), or stakeholder dynamics. The reasoning would be identical for any company facing this question.
specific_gaps: Industry context (logistics marketplace) not used to frame the answer
Operating jurisdictions (KR/JP/DE) not actively cited despite being in company_context
Recurring matter (cross-border data transfers) acknowledged but not central to reasoning
